stem:
2m + n = 50

In triangle ABC, sides AB and BC each have a length of m centimeters, and side CA has a length of n centimeters. The given equation represents this situation. Which of the following is the best interpretation of 50 in this context?

answerOptions.content: The sum of the lengths, in centimeters, of the three sides of the triangle
The length, in centimeters, of one of the two sides of equal length
The length, in centimeters, of the side that differs
The difference, in centimeters, between sides AB and CA

rationale: The expression 2m + n equals AB + BC + CA, which is the perimeter of the triangle. So 50 represents the perimeter (the sum of the three side lengths) of the triangle. Choice A is correct.
